ddls:
CREATE TABLE "uoms" (
  "uom_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_of_meas_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_of_meas_type" INTEGER /* Type of the unit of measurement (foreign key to uom_types) */,
  "target_uom_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the target UOM code */,
  "factor_b" REAL /* Conversion factor B */,
  "factor_c" REAL /* Conversion factor C */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks about the unit of measurement */,
  "information_source" TEXT /* Information source of the unit of measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source of the unit of measurement */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the UOM was last revised */,
  "change_id" TEXT /* Change ID for tracking changes */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the UOM is deprecated */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit of measurement */,
  "base_uom_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the base UOM code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the UOM is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the UOM */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the UOM was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the UOM */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the UOM was last modified */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system where the UOM data originates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uom_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uoms_unit_of_meas_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_of_meas_type") REFERENCES uom_types ("uom_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uom_types" (
  "uom_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UOM type */,
  "uom_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the UOM type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UOM type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the UOM type is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the UOM type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the UOM type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the UOM type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the UOM type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uom_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "uom_code_from" INTEGER /* UOM code to convert from */,
  "uom_code_to" INTEGER /* UOM code to convert to */,
  "factor_b" REAL /* Conversion factor B */,
  "factor_c" REAL /* Conversion factor C */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the conversion is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the conversion */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the conversion */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was last modified */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system where the conversion data originates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_uom_code_from FOREIGN KEY ("uom_code_from") REFERENCES uoms ("uom_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_uom_code_to FOREIGN KEY ("uom_code_to") REFERENCES uoms ("uom_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the user record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last modified */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "uom_code" INTEGER /* UOM code being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the UOM */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the UOM was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access was successful */,
  "request_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the request in milliseconds */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_uom_code FOREIGN KEY ("uom_code") REFERENCES uoms ("uom_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "uom_code" INTEGER /* UOM code being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the UOM was revised */,
  "change_id" TEXT /* Change ID for the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the revision is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the revision */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the revision */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was last modified */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system where the revision data originates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_uom_code FOREIGN KEY ("uom_code") REFERENCES uoms ("uom_code")
)
